creator: reichelt.dev@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to alexxis from comment #2)

Hi alexxis,

did the 

cd /usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger && make FLAVOR="nginx"

work for you?

It still wants to install the apache24 version for me.

$ cd /usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger && make FLAVOR="nginx"
Opens the window "rubygem-passenger-nginx-5.1.12_2" with the 2 options
[ ] DEBUG
[ ] SYMLINK

$ cd /usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger && make install clean
===>   rubygem-passenger-apache-5.1.12_2 depends on executable: rake - found
===>   rubygem-passenger-apache-5.1.12_2 depends on package: rubygem-rack16>=0 - found
===>   rubygem-passenger-apache-5.1.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby24 - found
===>   rubygem-passenger-apache-5.1.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/apxs - not found

Now it wants to install apache24-2.4.29.

I have nginx installed with the [x] PASSENGER option.

Thanks
